attributes.title: HTTP 500 Error Rate Over Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "HTTP 500 Error Rate Over Time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "params": {"field": "count"}, "schema": "metric"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "params": {"field": "timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 0}, "schema": "segment"}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom"}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left"}]}}
attributes.description: Shows HTTP 500 error count over the last 2 hours with anomaly spike visible

attributes.title: Recent Incidents
attributes.visState: {"title": "Recent Incidents", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "params": {}, "schema": "metric"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "params": {"field": "incident_id", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "_key"}, "schema": "bucket"}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "params": {"field": "severity", "size": 5}, "schema": "bucket"}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "params": {"field": "status", "size": 5}, "schema": "bucket"}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showTotal": false}}
attributes.description: Table showing recent incidents with severity, status, and resolution info

attributes.title: Incidents Auto-Resolved
attributes.visState: {"title": "Incidents Auto-Resolved", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "params": {}, "schema": "metric"}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"colorSchema": "Green to Red", "labels": {"show": true}}}}

attributes.title: Incident Severity Distribution
attributes.visState: {"title": "Incident Severity Distribution", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "params": {}, "schema": "metric"}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "params": {"field": "severity", "size": 5}, "schema": "segment"}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "isDonut": true}}

attributes.title: Sentinel-ES Agent Activity
attributes.visState:
{"title": "Sentinel-ES Agent Activity", "type": "markdown", "params": {"markdown": "## Sentinel-ES Agent Activity

This panel shows the latest agent investigation activity.

| Agent | Action | Status |
|-------|--------|--------|
| Orchestrator | Anomaly Detection | Running |
| Sleuth | APM Error Investigation | Ready |
| Historian | Git Commit Analysis | Ready |
| Scribe | Runbook Search | Ready |

*Updated via `/activity-log` API endpoint*", "fontSize": 12}, "aggs": []}
attributes.description: Markdown panel showing agent activity status

attributes.title: Sentinel-ES: SRE Agent Dashboard
attributes.description: Real-time view of Sentinel-ES autonomous SRE agent activity, incidents, and error rates
